'''Baroness''' was a title of [[Noble|nobility]] [[Bixene]], the [[Parent|daughter]] of [[Duke]] [[Rubix]], was appointed by [[Monarch of Shu-Torun|Queen]] [[Trios]] of [[Shu-Torun]].<ref name="Darth Vader 19" />
